case_title: DANIEL O'NEILL VS. TRUKISH AIRLINES INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,971.00 FILED BY O'NEILL, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'NEILL, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES INC. $567.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $632.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-04-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-04-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF DANIEL O'NEILL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY HAIMANOT DEMEKE (SALES AND TICKETING AGENT). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF O'NEILL, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **SEE SIGNATURE/RECD BY LINE*** NO SIGNATURE SERVED NOV-09-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2022 - JUDGMENT.
